root_text.an4.115:2.1: Tatra, bhikkhave, yamidaṁ ṭhānaṁ amanāpaṁ kātuṁ;
root_text.an4.115:2.3: idaṁ, bhikkhave, ṭhānaṁ ubhayeneva na kattabbaṁ maññati.
root_text.an4.115:2.8: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, ṭhānaṁ ubhayeneva na kattabbaṁ maññati.
root_text.an4.115:3.1: Tatra, bhikkhave, yamidaṁ ṭhānaṁ amanāpaṁ kātuṁ;
root_text.an4.115:3.3: imasmiṁ, bhikkhave, ṭhāne bālo ca paṇḍito ca veditabbo purisathāme purisavīriye purisaparakkame.
root_text.an4.115:3.6: atha carahidaṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattatī’ti.
root_text.an4.115:3.8: Tassa taṁ ṭhānaṁ akayiramānaṁ anatthāya saṁvattati.
root_text.an4.115:3.9: Paṇḍito ca kho, bhikkhave, iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an4.115:3.11: atha carahidaṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattatī’ti.
root_text.an4.115:3.13: Tassa taṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattati.
root_text.an4.115:4.1: Tatra, bhikkhave, yamidaṁ ṭhānaṁ manāpaṁ kātuṁ;
root_text.an4.115:4.3: imasmimpi, bhikkhave, ṭhāne bālo ca paṇḍito ca veditabbo purisathāme purisavīriye purisaparakkame.
root_text.an4.115:4.6: atha carahidaṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ anatthāya saṁvattatī’ti.
root_text.an4.115:4.8: Tassa taṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ anatthāya saṁvattati.
root_text.an4.115:4.9: Paṇḍito ca kho, bhikkhave, iti paṭisañcikkhati:
root_text.an4.115:4.11: atha carahidaṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ anatthāya saṁvattatī’ti.
root_text.an4.115:4.13: Tassa taṁ ṭhānaṁ akayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattati.
root_text.an4.115:5.1: Tatra, bhikkhave, yamidaṁ ṭhānaṁ manāpaṁ kātuṁ, tañca kayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattati—
root_text.an4.115:5.2: idaṁ, bhikkhave, ṭhānaṁ ubhayeneva kattabbaṁ maññati.
root_text.an4.115:5.3: Yampidaṁ ṭhānaṁ manāpaṁ kātuṁ, imināpi naṁ kattabbaṁ maññati;
root_text.an4.115:5.4: yampidaṁ ṭhānaṁ kayiramānaṁ atthāya saṁvattati, imināpi naṁ kattabbaṁ maññati.
root_text.an4.115:5.5: Idaṁ, bhikkhave, ṭhānaṁ ubhayeneva kattabbaṁ maññati.

translation_text.an4.115:1.3: There is a thing that’s unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:1.5: There is a thing that’s unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:1.7: There is a thing that’s pleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:1.9: There is a thing that’s pleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:2.1: Take the thing that’s unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:2.3: This is regarded as a thing that shouldn’t be done on both grounds:
translation_text.an4.115:2.6: and because doing it proves harmful.
translation_text.an4.115:2.8: This is regarded as a thing that shouldn’t be done on both grounds.
translation_text.an4.115:3.1: Next, take the thing that’s unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:3.3: It is here that you can tell who is foolish and who is astute in regard to human strength, energy, and vigor.
translation_text.an4.115:3.5: ‘Despite the fact that this thing is unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:3.10: ‘Even though this thing is unpleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:4.1: Next, take the thing that’s pleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:4.3: It is here that you can tell who is foolish and who is astute in regard to human strength, energy, and vigor.
translation_text.an4.115:4.5: ‘Even though this thing is pleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:4.10: ‘Despite the fact that this thing is pleasant to do,
translation_text.an4.115:5.1: Next, take the thing that’s pleasant to do, and doing it proves beneficial.
translation_text.an4.115:5.2: This is regarded as a thing that should be done on both grounds:
translation_text.an4.115:5.4: and because doing it proves beneficial.
translation_text.an4.115:5.5: This is regarded as a thing that should be done on both grounds.
